introSection: Mad Mouse was a hybrid wild mouse roller coaster built by UK manufacturer Maxwell previously located at Wonderland in Cleethorpes, Lincolnshire, England, UK.

sections.title: Accident
sections.content: There was an accident on the coaster on 3 June 1979 in which a 20 year old woman was thrown from one of the ride's cars.

fullText:
Mad Mouse was a hybrid wild mouse roller coaster built by UK manufacturer Maxwell previously located at Wonderland in Cleethorpes, Lincolnshire, England, UK.

There was an accident on the coaster on 3 June 1979 in which a 20 year old woman was thrown from one of the ride's cars.
